message:
test(resource-types): pin NaN-clamp guard contract on backpressure_severity (ft-xdt8j follow-on)

Companion to ec0160d6 (the source fix) and the proptest re-enabling
NaN in arb_severity_adversarial / arb_ratio_sequence. Add three
targeted unit tests that fence the contract directly at the API
boundary, separate from the property-based coverage:

  1. from_severity_nan_input_yields_finite_zero_severity_actions
     Asserts every ThrottleActions field stays in its documented
     range when the input is NaN: severity=0, poll_backoff=1×,
     pane_skip=0, detection_skip=0, buffer_limit=1×. Catches a
     regression where any one field (e.g. only severity gets
     guarded) leaks NaN through.

  2. observe_ratio_nan_input_does_not_poison_smoothed_ratio
     First-observation NaN must not initialize the EMA with NaN.

  3. observe_ratio_nan_after_warmup_keeps_smoothed_ratio_finite
     Pins the harder-to-spot regression: pre-fix, even a single
     NaN observation after a warmed-up EMA permanently corrupted
     smoothed_ratio() (NaN never decays under EMA). Post-fix the
     EMA stays finite and the NaN-substituted 0.0 sample pulls
     smoothed_ratio strictly downward.

Verified: cargo test -p frankenterm-core-resource-types --lib nan
passes 6/6 in 6.55s on /tmp/ft-swarm-violetmoth-target.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
